channel.title: Wikipedia on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore
channel.description: Recent content in Wikipedia on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore

item.title: Backing Up 12 Months of Wikipedia Data with Plakar
item.description: We backed up 12 months of English Wikipedia dumps into a single Kloset store, using deduplication and content-defined chunking to drastically reduce storage usage.
